title: AIIMS Kalyani Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani)
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Kalyani. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Kalyani Consultant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MD / PhD in Medical Microbiology / Virology / Viral Immunology / Molecular Biology/ relevant discipline
qualification.details: MD / PhD in Medical Microbiology / Virology / Viral Immunology / Molecular Biology/ relevant discipline. Candidates with closely related doctoral qualifications may be considered only if their thesis/work experience is demonstrably relevant to medical virology, viral diagnostics, medical microbiology or molecular diagnostics.

selection_process: Scrutiny by Expert/Consultancy Evaluation and Monitoring Committee Technical Evaluation based on qualifications
experience and technical proposal Financial Quote Opening for technically responsive applicants Approval by Competent Authority
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Consultant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Kalyani Consultant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Consultant for NABL Accreditation of VRDL post at AIIMS Kalyani is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Consultant for NABL Accreditation of VRDL position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD/PhD in Medical Microbiology, Virology, Viral Immunology, Molecular Biology, or a relevant discipline to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Consultant for NABL Accreditation of VRDL at AIIMS Kalyani.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny by an Expert Committee, technical evaluation based on qualifications and experience, financial quote opening, and final approval by the Competent Authority.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position at AIIMS Kalyani.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Kalyani located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Kalyani is located in Kalyani, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, which will provide all the detailed information.
